intent: Attach semantic tags (chi variables, Master Equation references, Ten Laws references, axiom refs, workflow tags) to the page and to every section_id, consuming upstream section-map + semantic-address from lane 02 and YAML metadata from lane 03.

input.format: section-map.json supplies {page_id, sections:[{section_id, heading_path, text, ordinal, block_types}]}; metadata.json supplies {domain, state, audience, use, risk, title, named_entity}. If upstream missing, lane mocks input from raw 00_DROP file and writes a loopback note.
input.mock_policy: If 02 or 03 outputs are absent, lane will run section-splitter logic on raw drop file and synthesize a placeholder section-map locally. Mock provenance is recorded in tags.json under provenance.mocked = true with reason.

output.format: tags.json conforms to a SemanticTag list per shared_lib/schemas.py:SemanticTag, plus a page-level tag block. section-tags.csv is the Excel-ready flat projection. semantic-address.json is a confirmation copy of the address emitted by lane 02 (lane 04 may issue loopback if address recomputed from tags disagrees).

semantic_address.policy: Lane 04 mints the canonical 10-variable vector + semantic_hash and composes them with the D/N/V/A/U/R address_candidate emitted by lane 03_YAML_METADATA. Lane 02 is narrow (section structure only) per lane_registry.json notes and CALIBRATION_EXPECTED.md. Vector + hash MUST be computed via configs/shared_lib/address.py (score_vector, vector_string, semantic_hash) — do NOT fork the format. Reviewed 2026-05-22.
semantic_address.loopback_trigger: If recomputed vector cannot be stabilized against the section_map (e.g. block_types missing), or if D/N/V/A/U/R from lane 03 cannot be joined to the vector deterministically, lane 04 writes 14_LOOPBACK_REVIEW/04_tags_loopback.json and marks tags.json.address_status = 'DRIFT'.

loopback_conditions: Vector cannot be deterministically computed from upstream section_map (block_types missing or section text empty).
Section text has zero recognizable tag signals (chi vars, laws, workflow markers) AND domain is THEOPHYSICS — likely upstream lossless failure.
Tag count > 50 per section (over-tagging — refine prompt).
address_candidate (D/N/V/A/U/R) from 03_YAML_METADATA is missing or has candidate_confidence='low'.

models: llm-first-pass (used by run_prompt.md); deberta-runner is NOT used here, that is lane 06

tag_taxonomy.master_eq_ref: Tag with master_equation_uuid when section invokes the Master Equation explicitly.
